sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَتْ سَارَةُ طَبْخَ الْأَرُزِّ مِنْ جَدَّتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Sara je naučila kuhati pirinač od bake.
sentences.translationEn: Sara learned to cook rice from her grandmother.

sentences.arabic: غَسَلَتِ الْأَرُزَّ وَوَضَعَتْهُ فِي الْقِدْرِ مَعَ الْمَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Oprala je pirinač i stavila ga u lonac s vodom.
sentences.translationEn: She washed the rice and put it in the pot with water.

sentences.arabic: أَضَافَتِ الْمِلْحَ وَتَرَكَتِ الْقِدْرَ عَلَى النَّارِ.
sentences.translation: Dodala je sol i ostavila lonac na vatri.
sentences.translationEn: She added salt and left the pot on the fire.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ قَلِيلٍ كَانَ الْأَرُزُّ جَاهِزًا وَشَهِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Nakon kratkog vremena pirinač je bio gotov i ukusan.
sentences.translationEn: After a while the rice was ready and delicious.
